name: render-professional-quality
description: Professional quality video rendering with quality gates and advanced media selection

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.5, max_tokens: 150, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Tu generes des descriptions visuelles professionnelles pour des videos TikTok business. Une seule phrase, concrete, prete pour synthese visuelle.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Topic: ' + $json.topic + '
Script: ' + $json.script.slice(0, 100) + '
Keyword: ' + $json.keyword + '

Genere UNE SEULE ligne descriptive de l'aesthetic visuel (modern, corporate, lifestyle, tech, etc) pour cette video.' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ shotstack_status: 'preparing', final_video_status: 'processing', render_payload: JSON.stringify($json), render_status: 'prepared', pipeline_status: 'rendering_requested', media_quality: $json.media_quality, media_score: $json.media_score }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ shotstack_render_id: $json.response?.id || $json.id, shotstack_status: 'queued', final_video_status: 'processing', pipeline_status: 'rendering_requested', render_quality: 'professional' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Select Media (Scored)').item.json.id, workflowRunId: $('Select Media (Scored)').item.json.workflowRunId, status: 'rendering_requested', media_quality: $('Select Media (Scored)').item.json.media_quality, shotstackRenderId: $('HTTP: Shotstack Render').item.json.response?.id || $('HTTP: Shotstack Render').item.json.id } }}

name: check-shotstack-fixed
description: Robust Shotstack render status check with error handling, retry, and idempotence

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Validate Input').item.json.contentIdeaId, shotstackStatus: $('Build Update Payload').item.json.patch.shotstack_status } }}
={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Validate Input').item.json.contentIdeaId, pending: true, shotstackStatus: $json.shotstackStatus, message: $json.message } }}
={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Validate Input').item.json.contentIdeaId, skipped: true, reason: $('Validate Render State').item.json.reason } }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ post_info: { title: $('Validate Init Context').item.json.title, privacy_level: $('Validate Init Context').item.json.selectedPrivacyLevel || 'SELF_ONLY', disable_duet: true, disable_comment: false, disable_stitch: true, video_cover_timestamp_ms: 1000 }, source_info: { source: 'FILE_UPLOAD', video_size: Number($('Validate Video Headers').item.json.videoSize), chunk_size: Number($('Validate Video Headers').item.json.videoSize), total_chunk_count: 1 } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $json.contentIdeaId, publishId: $json.publishId, uploadUrl: $json.uploadUrl, status: 'init_done' } }}

name: idea-script-generation-fused
description: Generate ideas + scripts in single workflow (fused creation + script)

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return Array.from({ length: input.ideaCount }).map((_, index) => ({ json: { ...input, iteration: index + 1, ideaIndex: index } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 100, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Generate exactly one unique TikTok content idea for category: ' + $json.category + '. Return only the idea text, no numbering.' } ] } }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ category: $json.category, topic: $json.topic, status: 'new', pipelineStatus: 'idea_created', publishStatus: 'draft', platform: 'tiktok', templateId: $json.templateId || null, tiktokAccountOpenId: $json.tiktokAccountOpenId || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.6, max_tokens: 500, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a TikTok content expert. Generate professional, punchy scripts optimized for mobile. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Category: ' + $json.category + '
Topic: ' + $json.topic + '

Generate a professional TikTok script:
- script: 1-3 short impactful sentences, natural French, conversational
- caption: 1-2 catchy phrases with 2-3 relevant hashtags
- hook: engaging first phrase to hook in 1s
- background_keyword: single word for background search

Return exactly this JSON:
{"script":"...","caption":"...","hook":"...","background_keyword":"..."}' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ scripts: $json.script, script_status: 'done', script_hook: $json.hook, caption: $json.caption, background_keyword: $json.background_keyword, pipeline_status: 'script_ready', llm_model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile' }) }}

name: render
description: Professional quality video rendering with quality gates and advanced media selection

parameters.jsonBody:

={{ JSON.stringify({ shotstack_render_id: $json.response?.id || $json.id, shotstack_status: 'queued', final_video_status: 'processing', pipeline_status: 'rendering_requested', render_quality: 'professional' }) }}
